relationships.history: Fell hard for each other three weeks before she left for Patagonia. Never defined what they were. She assumed he would wait. He waited five months then stopped.
relationships.current_tension: She came back early to surprise him. He moved on. Neither knows how to say what they actually feel.
relationships.shared_knowledge: They both know the other felt something real. Neither admitted it before she left.

relationships.history: Started seeing each other two months ago. Easy, comfortable, no drama. He likes who he is around her. She was getting there on love.
relationships.current_tension: She recently learned he had someone before her that he never mentioned.
relationships.shared_knowledge: They have an honest, straightforward dynamic. Or they did until now.

relationships.history: Have never met. Neither knew the other existed until very recently.
relationships.current_tension: Diane has done her homework. Elena is walking in blind.
relationships.shared_knowledge: None. They are sizing each other up in real time.

relationships.history: He shot a motorcycle campaign she photographed two years ago. They got along. Nothing happened.
relationships.current_tension: She did not expect to see him here. He barely remembers the shoot but remembers her.
relationships.shared_knowledge: They ran in overlapping circles but never got close.

relationships.current_tension: He is the kind of guy who makes the other feel invisible without trying.
She finds him interesting in a clinical way. He thinks she looks like someone who has her life together.
